surfaces.header: bg-white border-b border-slate-200 sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces.input: border border-slate-300 rounded-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-black focus:border-black transition-colors

buttons.primary: bg-black text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-none px-6 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-black border border-slate-300 hover:border-black hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-none px-6 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-slate-600 hover:text-black hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-none px-4 py-2 text-sm transition-colors
buttons.override_reset: bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-200 hover:text-black rounded-none px-2 py-1 text-xs font-mono transition-colors border border-slate-200

tables.header_cell: border-y border-slate-200 py-3 px-4 text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-[0.05em] text-slate-500 bg-slate-50 whitespace-nowrap
tables.body_cell: border-b border-slate-100 py-3 px-4 text-sm font-sans text-slate-800

tabs.trigger: px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-slate-500 border-b-2 border-transparent hover:text-black data-[state=active]:border-black data-[state=active]:text-black transition-colors rounded-none outline-none

inputs.text: flex h-9 w-full rounded-none border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-1 text-sm placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-black focus:border-black disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:bg-slate-50 disabled:text-slate-500
inputs.number: flex h-9 w-full rounded-none border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-1 text-sm font-mono text-right placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-black focus:border-black
inputs.textarea: flex min-h-[80px] w-full rounded-none border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-black focus:border-black disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:bg-slate-50

comments.container: border-l-2 border-amber-400 bg-amber-50/50 p-4 mt-2 text-sm font-sans
comments.author: font-medium text-slate-900 mr-2
comments.trigger: opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity text-slate-400 hover:text-black p-1

badges.positive: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-none text-xs font-mono font-medium bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200
badges.negative: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-none text-xs font-mono font-medium bg-red-50 text-red-700 border border-red-200
badges.neutral: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-none text-xs font-mono font-medium bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 border border-slate-200

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: Install @phosphor-icons/react for clinical, thin-lined icons that match the Swiss theme.
STYLING: Strictly adhere to 'rounded-none' for all components (cards, inputs, buttons). Do not use soft shadows; rely on 1px borders (border-slate-200) for separation.

FONTS: Implement font imports exactly as provided. Use JetBrains Mono exclusively for numerical data, tables, and tiny labels. Use Cabinet Grotesk for Headings, and IBM Plex Sans for body text. INTER IS BANNED for headings.
TABLE DESIGN: Ensure numbers are right-aligned and utilize 'font-mono tracking-tight'. Left-align text. Use a very subtle row hover effect ('hover:bg-slate-50/50').

DATA OVERRIDES: For editable financial fields (Admin/CEO role), show a native HTML input styled as 'components.inputs.number'. If the value differs from the CRM auto-computed value, visually indicate the override (e.g., a subtle yellow tint in the cell background or a small 'overridden' dot) and show a 'Reset to Auto' button.

COMMENTS FEATURE: For Investor role, rows and cards should have an 'Add Comment' trigger that appears on hover. Render existing comments underneath the row or section using the 'comments.container' style (amber left-border).
ROLE TOGGLE: Build a global state toggle in the header: 'View as: Admin / Investor' to easily verify read/write vs read-only UI behaviors during development.
TESTING: Apply distinct 'data-testid' attributes to all inputs, 'Reset to Auto' buttons, comment submission buttons, and major sections.
RESPONSIVENESS: Ensure horizontal scroll on complex financial tables (P&L, Revenue Build-Up) on mobile viewports.
